visual_description: Inside a car at night, three men sit in the front and back seats while city lights reflect on the windshield. The scene cuts to a close‑up of a man in a dark suit wiping his nose, with blurred figures in the background. Then a man in a dark jacket with an 'OCTB' badge sits in a hallway, looking forward while another man stands behind him.
